creator: ssanders@opnet.com
text:
ssh -X <host> does not setup port forwarding correctly.  /usr/bin/xauth has moved from /usr/bin/xauth to /usr/local/bin/xauth.

Fix: 

cd /usr/bin
ln -s /usr/local/bin/xauth xauth
How-To-Repeat: ssh -X <host>.  Then start any X based program.  The program will output an error like 'could not parse DISPLAY'.
